root_text.an7.85:1.3: Sakkāyadiṭṭhi bhinnā hoti, vicikicchā bhinnā hoti, sīlabbataparāmāso bhinno hoti, rāgo bhinno hoti, doso bhinno hoti, moho bhinno hoti, māno bhinno hoti.
root_text.an7.85:1.4: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, sattannaṁ dhammānaṁ bhinnattā bhikkhu hotī”ti.

translation_text.an7.85:1.1: “Mendicants, it’s because of breaking seven things that you become a mendicant.
translation_text.an7.85:1.3: Substantialist view, doubt, misapprehension of precepts and observances, greed, hate, delusion, and conceit.
translation_text.an7.85:1.4: It’s because of breaking these seven things that you become a mendicant.”
